sourcePrompt: A Mekong Delta stilt house standing about two meters above flood-prone ground on tall slender hardwood posts. A timber house with woven-mat walls and a thatched roof perched on the open stilt frame, a railed front porch along one side, and a steep ladder-stair climbing from the ground to the porch door; the shaded under-space stays open with a few cross-braces. Timber, thatch and air, perched and breezy.
